calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioner Roberta Lynn Takahashi present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and suffcient, and the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name to Angel Robin Ewing.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.
